name: Applesauce-Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oil and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and beat until well combined.
3. Blend in the vanilla extract.
4. Mix in the applesauce.
5. Gradually stir in the flours, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, oats, and raisins into the creamed mixture until fully incorporated.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly oiled baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
Makes 24 cookies. Each cookie contains approximately 56 calories, 10 grams of carbohydrates, 1 gram of protein, 2 grams of fat, 47 milligrams of sodium, 49 milligrams of potassium, and 11 milligrams of cholesterol. It is recommended for use as a half fruit exchange and half fat exchange.
